name: graph-memory
description: Persistent, self-evolving memory for AI agents. Gives any agent a knowledge graph that grows from conversations.
author: graph-memory

commands.name: memory-onboard
commands.description: Set up graph memory for the first time — choose storage location and seed initial memory

commands.name: memory-status
commands.description: Check memory system health — node count, warnings, pending operations

commands.name: memory-search
commands.description: Search the knowledge graph by keyword

commands.name: memory-morning-kickoff
commands.description: Turn the latest brief into a focused repo-specific morning kickoff

commands.name: memory-connect-inputs
commands.description: Set up host-side external inputs for briefs and context enrichment

commands.name: memory-input-refresh
commands.description: Refresh configured external input sources and ingest new data

agents.name: memory-onboarder
agents.description: Guided onboarding flow for new graph-memory installations

agents.name: memory-scribe
agents.description: Extract knowledge deltas from conversation snapshots. Dispatch in background when scribe-pending signal appears.

agents.name: memory-auditor
agents.description: Mechanical triage for pending deltas before librarian consolidation.

agents.name: memory-librarian
agents.description: Optimize knowledge graph topology — merge nodes, archive stale data, detect contradictions, update PRIORS. Dispatch in background when consolidation-pending signal appears.

agents.name: memory-dreamer
agents.description: Creative recombination — find surprising connections between knowledge nodes. Dispatch in background after librarian consolidation.

agents.name: memory-analysis
agents.description: Daily brief synthesis and analysis for the current project context.

agents.name: memory-morning-kickoff
agents.description: Turn the latest brief into a concrete kickoff plan for the active repository.

skills.name: graph-memory
skills.description: How to use the persistent memory system — remember, recall, search, edges, soma markers

skills.name: memory-onboard
skills.description: First-time setup for graph memory — initialize storage, configure runtime, seed initial memory

skills.name: memory-search
skills.description: Search the knowledge graph for nodes matching a given query

skills.name: memory-status
skills.description: Check the health and status of the graph memory system — node count, warnings, pending operations

skills.name: memory-morning-kickoff
skills.description: Kick off the day with a repo-specific operating brief from the latest memory context

skills.name: memory-wire-project
skills.description: Wire graph-memory awareness into the current project's instruction file — idempotent, safe to re-run

skills.name: recall
skills.description: Deep search memory graph with multi-hop edge traversal and full node reading

skills.name: memory-connect-inputs
skills.description: Configure optional Gmail and Calendar inputs for the morning brief

skills.name: memory-input-refresh
skills.description: Refresh Gmail and Calendar inputs on the host for the morning brief
